author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--ci-cd-restructure
content: Completed: Restructured CI/CD into 4 workflows for git flow. ci.yml retargeted to develop (removed main triggers, removed build-release). New ci-feature.yml for fast feature/* CI. publish.yml simplified (removed paths filter). New release-builds.yml for cross-platform binary artifacts. Trigger matrix verified — no duplicates. Ready for PR to main. Branch: feature/restructure-ci-cd-workflows, commit a8c4a97.
